description: Timetastic is a real time saver, and it works for the whole office. The work sheet is fantastic, since it is divided into days and hours and even the pay deductions from leave times are based on that sheet. The work sheet is visible to everyone in the office, so there is no more confusion as to who is supposed to be on duty or who in-fact is on leave for the day, or absent on vacation.
author: Cindy C.
pros: What I like most about this nifty little Timetastic app is the fact that it is able to group staff members together, separate from the bosses' group, which is also grouped together. It really helps not having that blend-over. The app updates all changes made to it instantly, and it can be downloaded to mobile or to your desktop at work. This app in my opinion, is the fastest, smoothest way to book days off or to get approval for leave days.
cons: What I like least about Timetastic is that while it is promoted as being a free app that you can use, the trial version does expire after two months and by then you feel like you have to pay for it. You feel that way because of the extent of time you've already invested into the app, and after having it on your phone for two months you have already logged everyone in the company's names, calendars, as well as everybody's leave day information and even private notifications that had been sent through the Timetastic app, and you don't want to loose any of that data, so you end up having to pay for the app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kate A.
pros: Timetastic has a simple, easy to use interface. This enabled us to delete some boring and complicated spreadsheets that were hard to maintain. Horray! New starters require no induction, and admins can quickly get on with this often tedious process. I rate the Slack integration since many of our team are remote - it enables us to effortlessly manage and track who's on leave. I think Timetastic is great value and have recommended to other small business owners I know.
cons: It's a pity you can't edit leave once it's approved, so admins get multiple emails from users - 'so and so cancelled their holiday', 'so and so requested a new holiday'. This could be merged into one notification, or you could permit admins to edit leave directly rather than deleting/adding. - It's not clear that users can book leave that spans non-working days without deducting from their allowance, so some people send multiple requests - booking Friday and Monday separately. This could also be solved by an email digest.

description: Its great to have so we know the whereabouts of the team as not everyone keeps an Outlook Calendar. Also people don't always have to ask me!! The guys are very efficient / on the ball at answering my questions.
author: Kate C.
pros: Its great to have a picture of all team members and where they are - be it on leave, on site etc. Easyish to use when people get the hang. Some people have trouble getting on in the first place (I think may be user error). Good for resourcing (when used properly).
cons: If we could have a bit more flexibility with leave etc. that has been input if we need to cancel just one day out of 7 for example. You need to cancel the whole request and resubmit. More colours for categories would be good too.

review_title: Easy to use and covers our basic needs!
author: Avery K.
pros: As HR & Talent Manager for the company, it can be quiet overwhelming trying to figure what is the best platform for all stakeholders involved. Luckily, Timetastic has been our trusty sidekick when it comes to the holidays and leave. It's easy to use, a good user experience, and doesn't break the bank. Overall, I've been very happy with the service!
cons: One of our perks is an extra holiday day for every year employed with the business. It can get a bit confusing to implement this automatically with Timetastic. It's almost easier just to enter everyone's extra day manually. Not a huge effort, but that's one thing that has been somewhat challenging.

review_title: Timetastic has taken the burden of absence management away.
author: Richard M.
pros: The fact that all users can see who clashes with their request for time off. Most Holiday planning happens in the family home and users can see, via the Timetastic App, potential clashes without waiting to go to work to look on a conventional Holiday planner. The manager has to simply approve or disapprove as appropriate. Job done. Also good value for money.
cons: It integrates quite well with Outlook as an additional calendar however it would be useful if it integrated in to our CRM as it would save having too run two separate diaries. Could also do with two managers being emailed about all holiday requests rather than just one admin.

review_title: A simple yet robust solution for staff management
description: Timetastic has made the management of my team a breeze. The developers have clearly focused on good UX principles and making the day to day usage easy - all while allowing for more powerful features underneath. While I believe Timetastic could provide some more integrations out of the box, the fact that they provide an API more than makes up for this fact. We experimented with using the Bradford Factor in our company, a method for determining the risk associated with an employee's pattern of absence, and I was happy to discover the API during this process. I easily pulled in the data for each employee, the absence types, and then used this to calculate a score for each employee. In the future we plan to integrate Timetastic into our project management system so we can avoid booking developers in for tasks when they're not going to be in the office.
author: Kriss C.
pros: Ease of use, clean and friendly interface, powerful underlying features.
cons: Could use a few more integrations with popular software

review_title: Great software allowing easy tracking of our team
description: We use Timetastic across 4 geographies, each with their own seasonal holidays - making it very easy to configure how each of the teams need to use the software, and providing us all with a central destination for what everyone is doing.
author: Harvey E.
pros: + Easy to set up accounts and configure + Very straightforward to define our own leave types, categories + Quick to use, seek approvals and process + Supports native holidays around the world + Slack integration sending data on who is in / out of the office each day
cons: We separated one of our divisions into it's own company - we had to export and re-import the data, it would have been really convenient to merge them in dynamically.

description: I have loved using Timetastic. It works exactly as it was pitched to us. Knowing your coworkers PTO schedule was overlooked before we started using Timetastic, but now I cannot imagine life without it.
author: Ken W.
pros: Timetastic is one of the cleanest and simplest tools I have ever used. It serves one purpose and it does it incredibly well. It provides a detailed look at the time off for everyone across our company. If I need to book a meeting, I always check my team's calendar first.
cons: There really isn't much to dislike. Timetastic is so simple and does its job so well. Some people might say that it is too simplistic from a UX perspective.

review_title: Simple and easy to use and excellent value for money
description: I do love Timetastic and its been a fantastic piece of software to use. I have recommended this to my friends within the industry.
author: Seamus M.
pros: My company never had any software in place before coming across Timetasic and it has been a sensation. It is so easy and simple to use to allocate the number of annual leave days to each staff member and split them up into teams and mark my team as favourites. I also love the ability to automatically post from TimeTastic to my general slack channel so the team will know that day who will be taking leave or at an external meeting each morning. This is cuts down on the questions relating to availability and potentially scheduling meetings with staff on leave.
cons: If I view my approved leave notification within the web app the mobile app does not remove the notification. As I am a bit of an OCD freak with notification I have to open the mobile app and view the notification to remove it from my phone.

description: It was a company process prior to me coming into the company but it's been really easy to use and if I want to do some changes more often than not the user face is intuitive enough that I can figure it out even without going to the help section. The integration into other tools is cool too. Our Slack now notifies the company of people on holiday through timetastic integration to remind them X won't be in the morning or Y is on holiday, which saves confusion or having to communicate ourselves. It makes it really easy for us to communicate with staff about holiday and any other anomaly days we organise.
author: Sophie S.
pros: Generally it just keeps the organisation of something that's important to staff but not necessarily always on the top of our priority list as management really simple so we can keep on top of it and stay organised whilst they stay satisfied.
cons: There's not anything I dislike about it, it does exactly what it says on the tin and we don't need it for anything massively complicated, we are not a huge company.

review_title: Easy to use, Easy to deploy, Easy to manage
description: Strong experience. Can't fault it. Never fails, easy to use. Simple yet effective.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Timetastic is a great piece of software for any company. The ease of use and most importantly the visibility / clarity is second to none in terms of other products I've seen.
cons: Not a lot, it does what it says. Perhaps better reporting would be beneficial. It's annoying that we have a system for this and a second system for HR management. Would be better if we had this as an all in one. Long terms we'd move away from timetastic once we get something that integrates both.

description: Really happy using Timetastic, it does exactly what we need it to do for our company. Very clear interface and excellent features.
author: Alexander B.
pros: Very clear interface Very easy for everyone to use Local public holiday database very useful Birthday and Work Anniversary function helpful Not too expensive per user Good system for keeping historic records
cons: Nothing comes to mind, it does what we need it to do in a very clear way

description: A pleasure to load, use and share info on our team. Can see at a glance when to schedule events.
author: Rod S.
pros: Easy, visual, colour coded and comprehensive tracker of any time taken off on leave or sick or working from home
cons: The half days would be better diagonal and therefore easier to see. Could do with hour by hour time off logging.

description: We really enjoy using Timetastic because it is a cost effective way to simply manage staff leave. The auto roll overs and approval process make the product great value for money.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: All of our staff use the system and it's features on a daily basis. We use the platform in our weekly priorities meeting to explain who has leave this week and any upcoming leave. Half of the team is based in Guernsey so we have utilised the custom holiday feature because in Guernsey we have a Liberation Day on May 9th, which is different to the UK.
cons: In an ideal world our team leave app would also tie into our scheduling app, which is Harvest Forecast. So there is extra duplication of time to set up holiday in Harvest once it has been approved in Timetastic.

author: Katie G.
pros: I like the ease of being easier able to view staff holidays
cons: I don't like the data download report and it does not show historic days booked off. I have to take a photo of screen before deleting old employees for ease.

review_title: An easy to use and lightweight tool for our HR toolbox
description: I use it pretty much daily and have recommended it to other small business owners who were looking for a better way to keep on top of staff holidays and sickness.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's really simple to use both from a management point of view, and for individuals arranging holidays and logging sickness etc. Most importantly, it feels really lightweight and fast for everything and there isn't any unnecessary bloat getting in the way of just getting the job done.
cons: If I was picky, the reporting could be slightly more extensive but I'm really clutching at straws to fill out this required input box.

description: We have used Timetastic for quite a few years now, during its time as a BETA site in a paid for site. The guys at Timetastic respond quickly to any issues and took on board my comments during the Beta phase making changes as they could. We have had very few issues since the site became paid for and overall find the site excellent and great value for money.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of use and clear display. It does exactly what I need it to do.
cons: There were a few things in the early days, but these were improved and now the software works as I would like it to.

description: This is a quick and easy solution to register leave with having to allocate a person to administer the holiday chart.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of use, setting up quickly and the ability to approve leave on the move.
cons: You cannot fast forward to a date in the future, you have to scroll through each month. Also it would be nice to be able to edit a calendar entry rather than cancel it and re input. An example is adding the reason for the leave.

description: It was great to use when we were still a small team (up to 25 or so). It's an excellent product for small teams but not ideal for bigger teams. Having said this, we still haven't found a product that is similar to Timetastic (in terms of ease of use) but better for bigger teams.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's really easy and simple to use, both as a user and as an admin.
cons: Tracking the balance of more than 1 type of leave is not optional. You can only track the remaining balance for any 1 type of leave at a time. (You can mark leave as sick leave, vacation leave, etc... but you can only view the balance of 1 leave. In order to find how many days of sick leave were taken by your employees during the year you will have to do this manually by downloading the report and going through it.

description: Timetastic has taken away the paper trail for our office manager, we can easily book leave and have department managers sign this off, we can easily see a picture of who's off and integrate this into our Slack application. Definitely a must have tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use Replaced our paper based solution Integrates with Slack so we can update the team on who is on leave automatically Flexibility to schedule leave, appointment etc.. for different time slots Has an App
cons: App is very good but doesn't have the full features of the web version

description: Totally fits the bill and does everything we need
author: Paul F.
pros: This product easily fulfils the task. It is easy to use and administer and provides us with the staffing flexibility we need in our business. Easy to add in different types of holiday and part time working
cons: To be honest we have been using this for ages and not found any issue yet

description: Overall it's good, we like it.. but we think more functions should start being added soon before we start needing more and thinking of moving to others
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's easy, it's SAAS, I can upgrade downgrade immediate, it's connected to our gmails so it's smooth
cons: it just needs to start having more functionality- HR functionalities, reminders on birthdays

review_title: Simple to use, integrates seemlessly with Google accounts and Slack
description: Great experience, solved our business need without any issue. Time out of office with approvals is something totally solved, it’s never something we have to think about.
author: Kyle M.
pros: Fit our needs exactly, and integrated well with our existing setup. Instant adoption with employees since it’s so easy to use.
cons: It didn’t support real well our international employees that have different leave policies. We got it working but have to do some additional tracking in a spreadsheet outside the app.

description: Fantastic - really helped our business. Open to suggestions. Quick and responsive support. Cost effective.
author: Lewis W.
pros: Helps our team Organisationally System is flawless, really simple to use, no one has an issue Departments are clear
cons: I really like Timetastic, I feel there is nothing negative about the software.

description: I have actually passed on the TimeTastic platform to a couple of other businesses to use. I know that All Points North did integrate their holiday system with TT. They too think its a great platform.
author: Ben M.
pros: Easy to use. Easy to create a new account. Calculates the pro-rata holiday entitlement which is great for people starting mid-year.
cons: I didn't manage to get the Google integration working - seemed a little complex and was annoying how it created a new user every time.
